def positive_magic_value_branching():
    rule_id = "magic_value_branching"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repeated branch-shaping numeric or string literals that likely want an explicit constant or policy name."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
